summary: The close-position receive calculation now matches mobile and the browser evidence proves the modal no longer double-counts unrealized PnL. I found one non-blocking test gap around half-cent rounding coverage.

comments.body: This regression test locks the PnL bug, but the current fixture does not specifically exercise the new cent-rounding behavior. With `basePosition`, `estimatedFees` is `10.5125`, and both `margin - estimatedFees` and `margin - round2(estimatedFees)` still render as `$2,364.49`, so reverting `roundedFees` could still pass here. Consider adding a half-cent boundary fixture so the per-component rounding change is independently covered.
